# Offline Recording Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize offline recording filename mapping, PMDFILES.TXT listing behavior, trigger mapping, and trigger runtime planning under shared ownership. They focus on deterministic file-type classification, split-file grouping, zero-size filtering, invalid-line filtering, date parsing, current Android/iOS representative-path differences, trigger model projection, and fake PMD control-point sequencing; `OfflineRecordingMetadataCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes the shared metadata mapping policy plus `metadata-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for filename-to-measurement mapping, split-file index stripping, invalid filename boundaries, PMDFILES grouping, zero-size and invalid-entry filtering, representative path platform policy, trigger model projection, disabled-trigger filtering, platform offline-recording vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate`, while `OfflineTriggerRuntimePolicyCommonTest.kt` executes the shared trigger runtime step policy plus the `trigger-runtime-readiness.json` behavior-family manifest. Byte-level platform adapter framing, facade error mapping, encrypted payload parsing, sensor sample decoding, and compile-verified shared runtime execution remain covered by platform tests and should be promoted separately if those behaviors move to shared code.
